hero.title: When the exhibition breathes with its visitors
hero.feature_qr_text: A web app: scan, converse, feel.
hero.feature_lang_text: Expert, Poet, Child, FALC… the tone follows the visitor.

ai_generation.button: AI generates… humans stay in control
ai_generation.title: How AI generates your texts
ai_generation.intro: To generate texts with AI, you need to provide context, clear and explicit instructions, and goals to achieve… otherwise the AI will invent, say anything, or "hallucinate".
ai_generation.workflow_title: Workflow: expertise honed over several years
workflow_steps: Prompt to generate the artist's bio (the more well-known the artist, the more precise it is)
Prompt to analyze the artwork photo against 5 criteria
Prompt to generate the 8 mediation texts
ai_generation.dependency_1: The 8 mediation texts can only be effectively generated <qs>if</qs> the artwork description has been generated first.
ai_generation.dependency_2: The artwork description can only be effectively generated <qs>if</qs> the artist's bio has been generated first.
ai_generation.editable_body: Regardless, ALL AI-generated texts are fully editable. And if you really don't like the generated text, you can write your own from scratch.
ai_generation.persona_warning: Note: the different generated personas may be difficult to adapt. Edit and write with care…
ai_generation.closing: AI can generate anything if you ask it anything!

hero.feature_hearts_text: Narrative 'likes' that feed the exhibition in real time.
hero.image_alt: Visitors observing artworks in a gallery
hero.intro_1:
In a traditional exhibition, collecting feedback often disrupts the flow: exit survey, cold kiosk, promise of a questionnaire.
AIMEDIArt offers something different: continued mediation, a discreet ear, and a large screen that becomes the soul mirror of the room — what the audience feels, without feeling surveyed.
hero.intro_2:
The more visitors and genuine interactions there are, the richer the emotional scenography becomes.
The virtuous cycle begins: a gesture on the phone, a response, an interaction — and the exhibition comes alive.
hero.quote: Dynamic feedback — "It's not a spreadsheet in the corner: it's a living extension of the exhibition — a two-way mirror where mediation and feeling become one."

exposition.title: Feedback becomes a collective breath
exposition.image_alt: Visitors in an exhibition installation, banners and immersive space
exposition.text_1: AIMEDIArt is a scenographic listening tool: what most exhibitions barely sense — genuine feeling — becomes visible and shared material. Visitors don't 'fill out' anything: they continue the conversation started in front of the artwork.
exposition.text_2: A screen that doesn't display cold statistics; it reveals the room's pulse. Even in hushed silence, emotional activity visibly bubbles: it reassures, invites lingering, and places every gaze at the centre of the story.

oreille.title: The attentive ear, the natural continuation of dialogue
oreille.image_alt: Illustration — mediation and listening within the exhibition
oreille.text_1: The 'survey' is no longer a blunt interruption between rooms. AIMEDIArt reads immediate reactions, the intonations of free-form text, the heartbeats given to a work: without any imposed questionnaire, the system understands, for example, that a technique surprised, moved, or clarified something for the visitor.
oreille.text_2: For the venue and its partners, it's a report that speaks of effectiveness and engagement — the exhibition's 'pulse' in real time. For the artist and curator, it's a living dashboard: adjusting a light, refining a label, responding from the studio when the room murmurs its incomprehension or wonder.

output.title: Three faces for feeling — beyond the Excel sheet
output.card_nuage_text: Each response becomes a coloured particle feeding a moving form: the wall breathes with the words and hearts received.
output.card_murmures_text: The most poetic phrases captured by AIMEDIArt appear and fade like a collective conversation — organic, unpredictable, human.
output.card_thermometre_text: An artistic gauge showing the collective emotion of the room in real time — shared, readable, free of statistical jargon.
output.image_alt: Visitor in a blue hoodie in front of abstract paintings in a stone-walled gallery with exposed beams
output.intro: This is not a spreadsheet extension stuck to the wall: it's a feedback scenography. Three visual grammars to express the same truth — that of the audience.

live.title: A scenography that reacts: a canopy of emotional climate
live.canopy_caption: What you see here is an animated metaphor: a canopy pulsing at the collective rhythm — as your wall could pulse at the rhythm of visits.
live.canopy_cta: Click on the block below to open the projection in a new tab (TV / projector).
live.text_1: Most tools deliver numbers the next day. AIMEDIArt plays the live card: feedback is no longer an end-of-visit chore, it becomes the fuel of the exhibition itself.
live.text_2: Imagine an exhibition on climate: the more visitors express hope through dialogue, the more the screen grows a luminous forest; the more worry dominates, the denser and darker the landscape becomes. Feeling drives a generative scenography — the space and the message breathe together.

friction.title: From the last exchange to action — seamlessly
friction.text_1: At the end of the mediation, AIMEDIArt doesn't switch to 'please rate our service'. It stays in its role: a voice asking whether passion crossed the room, whether the style remains mysterious, or whether the lighting was understood — natural questions, answered with emotions and hearts, not checkboxes.
friction.text_2: Then comes the seamless transition to the useful: 'If you'd like to keep a memory of our exchange, I can email you the list of artworks that moved you?' The visitor leaves an address for a service rendered, not for a marketing intrusion — a LeadGen that grows from genuine connection.

pont.title: The real-time bridge between smartphone and smart-expo!
pont.hearts_desc: Each heart appears live on the wall screen.
pont.text_1: Every gesture on the phone triggers a reaction on the venue's screen: 'hearts' shower the wall when visitors like a work; an emotion wheel — dazzled, moved, intrigued, at peace, troubled, amused — transforms intentions into a shared landscape.
pont.text_2: If ten people choose 'at peace' together, the screen can broadcast a wave of colour or a soft texture: the visual impact carries the group's memory, not just an individual score.

production.title:
From photo to QR code — in hours,
not weeks
production.text_1: A single artwork photograph is enough: AIMEDIArt chains analysis, writing, translation, audio and label printing — no scattered tools, no weeks of preparation.
production.text_2: You stay in control of every generated text. AI accelerates; humans validate, refine and sign off on the mediation.
production.step_photo_text: Import or capture — the starting point of the pipeline.
production.step_analysis_text: AI describes the artwork against explicit curatorial criteria.
production.step_personas_text: Expert, Poet, Child, EAL… up to 8 discourse registers and 5 languages depending on your subscription.
production.step_audio_text: Female and male audio guides — as many as the registers and languages included in your plan.
production.step_cartel_text: Print-ready for the gallery, with a unique QR code per artwork.
production.step_stats_text: Scans, emotions, responses — exportable as PDF for your partners.
production.stat_voices_label: voices per audio guide and per language

parcours.title:
A 3-step journey,
clear at a glance
parcours.image_alt: Two visitors in a gallery between two large framed photographic portraits
parcours.step1_text: In front of the artwork, the visitor scans. Instant, no friction.
parcours.step2_text:
Expert, Poet, 5-year-old…
and even FALC* if needed.
parcours.step3_text: AI-suggested emotions, then emotional vote from 1 to 5 hearts ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
parcours.commissaire_title:
A finer understanding
of how artworks are received
parcours.commissaire_text: For curators, galleries and cultural venues, every scan becomes useful data without burdening the visitor experience.
parcours.benefit_4: A deeper understanding of how artworks are received
parcours.benefit_6: PDF reports for curators, funders and artists
parcours.geography_title:
Where does your
audience come from?
parcours.geography_text: Beyond footfall counters, AIMEDIArt maps the geographic origin of your visitors on an interactive map. City, region, country: measure the real reach of your exhibition.
parcours.geography_disclaimer: Approximate origin, derived from the profile provided or IP address — never intrusive, always in service of mediation.
parcours.geography_demo_legend: Each blue dot represents a visitor geolocated at city or region level.
parcours.pdf_text: Emotions, scans per artwork, engaging responses and mapping: export a full PDF report for funders, steering committees or artist portfolios — in one click from your organisation workspace.
parcours.pdf_demo_caption: Illustrative example — preview of the exportable statistics PDF report.
parcours.stats_demo_image_alt: Preview of the AIMEDIArt statistics dashboard

tarifs.title:
Clear offers,
tailored to the rhythm of exhibitions
tarifs.image_alt: Visitor looking at a large landscape mountain print in a gallery
tarifs.monthly_text: Flexibility. Cancellable at the end of the event.
tarifs.monthly_text_veille_note: Before cancelling, consider the STANDBY plan…
tarifs.annual_text: Price advantage “10 months for 12”: 2 months free. The most peaceful for keeping your catalogue and artwork files.
tarifs.data_note_1: On cancellation, access remains active until the end of the paid period. After that, data is permanently deleted.
tarifs.data_note_2: If you wish to keep your catalogue and artwork files for a future exhibition, the Annual subscription is the most serene (and economical over time!) solution.
tarifs.error_text: Check the Supabase connection, the presence of the pricing table and RLS read permissions.
tarifs.empty: No offer found in the pricing table.
tarifs.empty_hint: Check that the table has rows and run the pricing_public_anon_select SQL policy (file supabase/sql/pricing_public_anon_select.sql).
tarifs.plan_desc_etincelle: Entry offer, ideal for testing dialogue-based mediation.
tarifs.plan_desc_atelier: For artists and organisations with a fixed catalogue.
tarifs.plan_desc_horizon: For galleries, associations or multi-project organisations.
tarifs.plan_desc_envergure: For growing institutions, multi-exhibition with a larger catalogue.
tarifs.plan_desc_rayonnement: For exhibition networks and multi-site institutions.
tarifs.plan_desc_zenith: Tailor-made offer for festivals, biennials and major cultural events.
tarifs.plan_summary_etincelle: Exhibition powered by a focused selection of works
tarifs.plan_summary_atelier: Fixed catalogue, enriched mediation throughout the exhibition
tarifs.plan_summary_horizon: Multiple projects, evolving catalogue, ambitious structure
tarifs.plan_summary_envergure: Strong growth: large catalogue and wider audience
tarifs.plan_summary_rayonnement: Exhibition networks — unlimited artworks and visitors
tarifs.plan_summary_rayonnement_audience: Major art museums, cultural exhibition networks, art centres…
tarifs.plan_summary_rayonnement_footer: Unlimited artworks and visitors — on request
tarifs.plan_summary_zenith_audience: Festivals, biennials, fairs, international trade shows…
tarifs.plan_summary_zenith_footer: Capacity and support scaled to your event — on request

standby_modal.title: Put your exhibition on standby
standby_modal.subtitle: Standby is not a shutdown: it is a smart pause between active periods that keeps your data and makes reactivation simple.
essentials_items: The standby plan is billed monthly.
Switching to standby takes effect at your next billing date.
Your data and back office remain accessible.
You can reactivate your active plan whenever you wish.
standby_modal.purpose_title: What is the standby plan for?
standby_modal.purpose_text: When the exhibition is no longer open to the public, standby keeps your organisation space alive at a reduced cost while preserving catalogue, artwork records and history.
when_items: Between two exhibitions in the same season
While preparing the next show without public access yet
To keep catalogue and settings without a full active subscription
standby_modal.eligibility_intro: Standby is available for monthly Studio and Horizon subscriptions only.
eligibility_items: Available only for Studio and Horizon on monthly billing
The “1½ months free” discount applies to active annual subscriptions only
standby_modal.commercial_logic_title: Monthly vs annual: two complementary approaches
standby_modal.commercial_monthly_text: Flexibility aligned with your exhibition schedule, with standby between active periods.
standby_modal.commercial_annual_text: Commitment over the year, with the “1½ months free” pricing advantage.
standby_modal.commercial_no_cumul: You cannot combine standby flexibility with the annual pricing advantage: choose monthly flexibility or annual savings.
accessible_items: Your back office and organisation account
Your data, statistics and mediation history
Simple reactivation when you are ready
changes_items: The exhibition is no longer publicly active for visitors
Visitor journey (QR, in-room mediation) is suspended
Features tied to a live exhibition are not deployed
You switch to a lighter standby monthly rate

compare_rows.label: Open to the public
compare_rows.active: Yes — mediation and visitor journey active

standby_modal.pricing_note: Standby applies to your current monthly plan (Studio or Horizon). It is not a main subscription — it ensures continuity between active periods.
standby_modal.reactivation_text: When your next exhibition is ready, switch back to an active plan from your organisation space. Your artworks, settings and history are already there.
standby_modal.request_success: Your standby plan request has been recorded. You can cancel it within 24 h from your profile.
standby_modal.request_error: Unable to record the standby plan request.
standby_modal.error_role: The standby plan is reserved for users below level 6.
standby_modal.error_not_eligible: Your current subscription is not eligible for the standby plan (monthly Atelier or Horizon required).
standby_modal.error_already_pending: A standby plan request is already active.

access.intro: Scan near the artwork, no app to install: the web-app opens, offers reading profiles (child, expert, poet, plain language…) or follows the phone’s language, then brings the visitor back to feedback without ever breaking their flow.
access.title:
A journey that adapts
to every gaze
access.image_alt: Senior visitor with a cane browsing a photographic exhibition on white walls
access.card1_text: No install: the gesture in front of the artwork opens the mediation.
access.card2_text: From expert to poetic tone, up to FALC if needed.
access.card3_text: A central button, like a social live — interest is read in real time.
access.card4_text: A warm voice that transforms emotions into useful data behind the scenes.

contact.title: Give a voice — and a screen — to your next exhibition
contact.image_alt: Two visitors from behind, in front of framed photographs on a gallery wall
contact.text_1: Residency, museum, gallery or multi-venue tour: tell us about your scenography and how you want to hear from your audience.
contact.text_2: AIMEDIArt fuses mediation and feedback so that the back-and-forth is as natural as a conversation in the room.

connexion.promo_link: Connected exhibition: Don't let the network limit your creativity
connexion.title_line2: Don't let the network limit your creativity

challenge.title: The challenge: no connectivity, a compromised experience
challenge.image_alt: Frustrated visitor in an art gallery, smartphone with no network signal
challenge.body:
Organising an immersive exhibition is a long-term effort. Yet on site, a major obstacle can undermine your work: <bold>missing or unstable Wi-Fi.</bold>

In exhibition venues, thick walls, metal structures or simply overcrowded public networks often prevent visitors from accessing your interactive content, audio guides or dedicated apps. A cut-off experience, endless loading — and audience engagement fades. Don't let technology become the bottleneck of your exhibition.

solution.title: The AIMEDIArt solution — Your private, standalone Wi-Fi infrastructure
solution.image_alt: Local Wi-Fi infrastructure diagram: router, PoE switch, access points and gallery
solution.intro: At AIMEDIArt, we can offer you a proprietary infrastructure as an option. You invest in your own working tool — a turnkey solution built to last and support every project, wherever the venue.

bullets.freedom: <bold>Total freedom</bold>: You own your hardware. Once the exhibition ends, the system is designed to be reset in a snap.
bullets.reuse: <bold>Endless reuse</bold>: Dismantle, transport and redeploy your kit in a new gallery, trade fair or cultural space. Your configuration stays saved, ready for your next scenography.
bullets.performance: <bold>Guaranteed performance</bold>: High-density Wi-Fi technology, fully independent of the venue's internet or 5G, ensuring a smooth experience for every visitor.

packs.title: A modular solution — Configurations tailored to your needs
packs.intro: Because every exhibition has its own spatial constraints, we designed scalable packs to cover all floor areas effectively:
packs.estimate_footnote: *Material cost estimates excl. VAT, excluding installation labour. For a more precise quote, use the CUSTOM QUOTE button below

solo.title: Solo Pack (1 access point)
solo.desc: Ideal for a small room, booth or dedicated zone up to 150 m².

standard.title: Standard Pack (4 access points)
standard.desc: Perfect for a large gallery or open floor, covering up to 600 m² with optimal connection stability.

grand.title: Large Space Pack (up to 8 access points)
grand.desc: Designed for vast exhibition halls, multi-space routes or complex sites, covering 1,200 m² and beyond with smooth high-traffic handling.

simplicity.title: Simplicity first — Ready to use
simplicity.image_alt: Plug & Play diagram: local server, PoE switch and Wi-Fi access points in a gallery
simplicity.intro: We know your expertise is artistic, not technical. That's why our setup is designed to be accessible to everyone:

bullets.plug_play: <bold>Plug & Play</bold>: One control hub, an intuitive switch and simplified wired setup.
bullets.speed: <bold>Fast deployment</bold>: Your exhibition is ready for the public in under an hour.
bullets.discretion: <bold>Total discretion</bold>: Our Wi-Fi access points blend into your gallery décor, keeping the focus on your artworks.

simplicity.outro: With AIMEDIArt, you invest in a durable solution that guarantees your audience total immersion, without interruption, wherever you are.

form.title: Quote request - Connection pack
form.preferred_contact_time: What is the best time to contact you? (date, time, …)
form.need_description: Description of my needs (room type, floor area, …)
form.floor_plan: I'm sending you a plan of my room or exhibition venue
form.success_body: Got it, thank you very much! Your message has reached us safely. We'll get back to you shortly to follow up, and we'll do our best to contact you during any time slots you may have shared with us.
form.error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
form.error_phone: Invalid phone number for the selected country.
form.error_auth: Session expired. Please sign in again.
form.error_table: Unable to save: apply migration_78 on Supabase.
form.warn_floor_plan: Request saved, but the floor plan could not be uploaded.
form.warn_email: Request saved, but emails could not be sent. Check Resend (RESEND_API_KEY, aimediart.com domain verified).
form.warn_email_detail: Request saved, but emails could not be sent: {{detail}}

commencer.rayonnement_intro: The Rayonnement offer adapts to your network or your event. Here's how to proceed, depending on your situation.
commencer.zenith_intro: The Zénith offer adapts to festivals, biennials and major cultural events. Here's how to proceed, depending on your situation.
commencer.devis_intro: Here's how to continue your tailored request, depending on your situation.
commencer.rayonnement_quote_bullet_1: Specify dates, venue, expected attendance and needs (artworks, mediation, distribution).
commencer.rayonnement_quote_bullet_2: A team member will reply to arrange a discussion and a costed proposal.
commencer.zenith_quote_bullet_1: Specify dates, venue, expected attendance and the scale of the event (festivals, biennials, fairs…).
commencer.zenith_quote_bullet_2: A team member will reply to arrange a discussion and a tailored proposal.
commencer.need_description: Description of my need (type of event, number of artworks exhibited, expected number of visitors, …)
commencer.zenith_need_description: Description of my event (type, dates, venue, expected attendance, number of artworks, mediation and distribution needs…)
commencer.intro_veille: Log in to request the switch to the standby plan (Atelier or Horizon, monthly subscription only).
commencer.intro_default: To order or activate an offer, you go through the secure AIMEDIArt space (login or organisation account creation).
commencer.bullet_has_account: Already have an account? Log in to continue the configuration, the catalogue or the exhibition tracking.
commencer.bullet_first_time: First time? On the next screen, use “Create an account” with your professional e-mail; you will complete the organisation information according to your journey.
commencer.bullet_visitor: General public / visitor? Visitor registration is done from the on-site scan journey; this page is mainly for exhibition teams.
commencer.login_already: I already have an account — log in
commencer.login_or_create: Log in or create an account

engagement.toast_request_desc_default: Your selection of included languages has been saved. AIMediArt will contact you to finalise the custom contract.

engagement.intro_rayonnement: Custom offer for networks and large events. Select the languages included in your contract; any additional language will be subject to a complementary quote.
engagement.intro_default: Choose your billing method. The annual offer applies the displayed discount compared to 12 months at the monthly rate.

engagement.partner_terms_applied: Partner commercial terms applied to your organisation.
engagement.dialogue_mediation: Conversational mediation and full backoffice tools

engagement.helper_audio_default: Choosing a language here also automatically adds it to Mediation.
engagement.extra_langs_quote_desc: Specify any language you want besides the languages included above.
